case_title: MUIR PARTNERS vs. LAKSAMANA, AUGUSTINE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUIR PARTNERS AS TO DEFENDANT LAKSAMANA, AUGUSTINE FRENCH, SUZETTE DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LAKSAMANA, AUGUSTINE FRENCH, SUZETTE
